entries.visual_note: Front neutral source and projection align exactly; overlay shows no doubled edges, mismatch marks, clipping, displacement, or added geometry.
Front three-quarter-left silhouette, face, wings, hand, and staff coincide cleanly with no visible projection defect.
Left-profile contours and narrow wing/staff details remain coincident; no ghosting, clipping, or non-source pixels are visible.
Back three-quarter-left projection preserves the hat, beard, robe, wings, and staff placement without doubled contours or mismatch marks.
Rear neutral source and projection are visually identical, including both wing edges and staff; no displacement or clipping is present.
Back three-quarter-right geometry aligns throughout the asymmetrical robe, shoes, wings, head, and staff with no visible differences.
Right-profile source and projection coincide on all thin extremities and side contours; no doubled edge or extra geometry is visible.
Front three-quarter-right stance is faithfully projected, including bent arm, hand, feet, wings, and staff with a clean overlay.
Side pose with separated staff remains pixel-aligned across the full silhouette; no occlusion error, clipping, or mismatch mark appears.
Rear pose with partly folded wings matches exactly in both panels and overlay, with no missing wing, hand, staff, or robe pixels.
Relaxed planted-staff pose has a single aligned contour and identical internal colors; no projection artifact is visible.
Balanced idle pose aligns on hat tip, wing tips, shoes, hands, and staff with no clipping, displacement, or colored defect marks.
Warm camera-ready idle is visually identical between source and projection; transparent overlay reveals no doubled edges.
Attentive idle preserves the angled arm and hand placement exactly, with clean silhouette and color alignment throughout.
Speaking-ready idle projects without any visible geometry or color deviation; all outer edges remain unclipped and coincident.
Listening-ready idle matches the source across face, beard, robe, wings, staff, and hands with no overlay ghosting.
Two-hand staff-rest pose retains exact hand, staff, face, robe, and wing geometry; no missing or extra marks are visible.
Carried-staff stepping silhouette and raised limbs align exactly; no doubled boundary, clipping, or displaced pixels appear.
Folded-wing idle source and projection are visually coincident, including narrow colored wing runs and staff edges.
Displayed-wing idle preserves the broader wing silhouette and all internal colors without mismatch marks or source-external geometry.
Neutral listening gesture aligns at the fingers, chin, face, staff, wings, and feet with no visible projection differences.
Warm listening pose preserves the head tilt and open palm exactly; overlay remains clean with no doubled or displaced contours.
Intense listening pose matches source geometry and color placement throughout, including separated staff and wing edges.
Offscreen-left listening pose retains the angled head, hand, robe, wings, and staff exactly with no clipping or ghosting.
Offscreen-right listening pose is fully coincident in source, projection, and overlay; no mismatch indicator is visible.
Upward listening pose preserves the extreme head angle and hand-to-ear contour without doubled edges or altered geometry.
Considering pose aligns exactly at the tilted face, chin hand, robe, staff, wings, and feet; overlay shows no defects.
Upward-recall pose retains the diagonal head and facial details with no color mismatch, displacement, clipping, or added pixels.
Staff-lean thinking pose remains exactly aligned along the diagonal staff, crossed hands, body, and wing silhouettes.
Pacing-preparation pose preserves raised-foot and bent-body geometry; no doubled edge, clipping, or projection-only mark appears.
Small-realization expression and raised hand are visually identical between source and projection with a clean transparent overlay.
Clear-realization open-hand gesture, face, wings, robe, and staff align exactly; no visible mismatch or non-source geometry remains.
